dialogos.texto_en: Whew...\nI had so much fun at Shurijo Castle.
Just as you said, there were so many sights to behold.
I'm a bit tired now.\nLet's take a break.
I am...going to get some rest inside...
Are you okay, Miku?\nI'll go with you.
Thanks...
Me too, I might take a look at the shops inside.
Oh, I want to rummage for some souvenirs too!\nHow about you, Raiha-chan? You comin'?
You bet!
I might go too.\nI'm curious to see what they have.
After this, we are going to Kokusai dori, right?\nThat might be the best place to find souvenirs.
But there might be some things here\nthat we can't find anywhere else.
What about you, Futaro-kun? Are you coming with us too?
I'm fine. I'm just gonna rest here.
Okay, we'll be back soon.
(Souvenirs... I should buy something for Dad\n as a souvenir.)
(And for the others who have helped me,\n like the store manager, Maeda, and Takeda...\n No, I might not have a chance to give it to them.)
(Hahaha, it's funny how things have changed.\n Meeting the quintuplets and Ichika...)
(I never would have dreamed\n that we'd be making memories like this.)
(Memories, eh...)
(I wonder if I will look back on this moment someday.\n What we bought here, for example.)
...Ah, I see.
(If we all bought something together\n as a memento of our Okinawa trip,\n it would be the best memory ever, wouldn't it?)
(Ah, well, the quintuplets and Raiha could get matching\n souvenirs, but to have me included...)
...That might be pretty embarrassing.
We're back, Futaro-kun.
Oh, you're back.\nMiku, you okay?
Yes, I took a proper break, so I'm okay.
Let's move on, then.\nTo Kokusai dori.
Okay, let's go.
Okay.
(If we're looking for matching souvenirs,\n Kokusai dori would be the best place to go.\n Alright...!)
